page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4g.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with 32 vCPUs, utilizing a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The virtualized environment is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 4.0 GB per core. For local storage, it includes a bundled 1919 GB SSD. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. No GPU hardware is included in this configuration.

This hardware profile offers a balanced ratio of compute to memory alongside high-capacity local SSD storage, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring direct, low-latency storage access without the overhead of external network storage. Suitable workloads include relational databases, NoSQL data stores, medium-scale data processing, and general-purpose applications that benefit from dedicated CPU allocation and local SSD performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4g.8xlarge is an x86_64 server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at 2.7 GHz. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it provides 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated compute allocation. The system is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding 4.0 GB of memory per core, and includes a bundled 1919 GB local SSD for high-speed storage requirements. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Lacking GPU acceleration, this instance is designed for non-graphical workloads. The combination of dedicated Intel Xeon cores, a balanced memory-to-vCPU ratio, and substantial local SSD capacity makes this instance well-suited for database hosting, transactional applications, and general-purpose enterprise workloads requiring consistent performance and localized storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4g.8xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and a 1919 GB local SSD, optimized for database and general-purpose workloads.

tagline: A dedicated Intel Xeon instance featuring thirty-two physical cores, balanced memory, and high-capacity local SSD storage for database workloads.
